cryptorate: My first React application. Cryptorate connects with external API - DatoCMS and shows data about cryptocurrencies. Cryptorate has pagination and is fully responsive.
todo-list: My own clone of Google Keep - simple TODO List. Application allows user to add, delete and rename lists it can also add, remove, sort and select as done items inside list.
tic-tac-toe: XOXO is a simple tic-tac-toe game with three game modes:  multiplayer local, singleplayer vs computer and multiplayer online (socket.io). Game also has theming and translations.
